ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balances context and persona but could be more natural in tone, slightly less consistent with the Witch oracle's cryptic nature.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: Lacks direct relevance to context and persona but maintains a natural flow in dialogue, not aligning well with the Witch oracle's character.
